name: chunknet
description: Chunknet is a wallet-based P2P cloud storage desktop app with encrypted chunks, peer discovery, and manifest sync.
author: Diya Ashour

scripts.dev: node scripts/patch-seed-identity-actions.cjs && node scripts/fix-live-clicks.cjs && node scripts/patch-ui-folder-scope.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-actions.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-identity-clear.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-final-guard.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-no-helper.cjs && node scripts/patch-preload-drive-ipc.cjs && node scripts/patch-folder-tree-actions.cjs && node scripts/patch-folder-manifest-sync-privacy.cjs && node scripts/patch-network-folder-metadata.cjs && node scripts/patch-drive-folder-compat.cjs && node scripts/patch-folder-runtime-stable.cjs && node scripts/patch-p2p-update-file-compat.cjs && node scripts/patch-upgrade-paypal-ui.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-no-helper.cjs && vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000

scripts.build: node scripts/patch-ui-folder-scope.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-actions.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-identity-clear.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-final-guard.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-no-helper.cjs && node scripts/patch-preload-drive-ipc.cjs && node scripts/patch-folder-tree-actions.cjs && node scripts/patch-folder-manifest-sync-privacy.cjs && node scripts/patch-network-folder-metadata.cjs && node scripts/patch-drive-folder-compat.cjs && node scripts/patch-folder-runtime-stable.cjs && node scripts/patch-p2p-update-file-compat.cjs && node scripts/patch-live-folder-no-helper.cjs && vite build
